headline: Ecosystem at cold start — zero operational activity amid broad 7% market drawdown
summary: All four swarm modules report null/idle state: no worker cycles, no bazaar listings, no intake packs. Oracle confirms correlated -7% 24h declines across ETH and AERO while USDC holds peg. GitHub activity shows scaffolding commits but no production workload has been processed.
sections: Oracle: ETH at $1,849.53 (-7.14%), AERO at $0.370 (-7.10%), USDC stable at $0.9996 (+0.01%). Risk-off move is synchronized across volatile assets; stablecoin peg intact.
Worker: Zero cycles executed. last_cycle_at is null, last_cycle_ok_actions is 0, last_channels empty. No compute has been dispatched or completed.
Commerce & Intake: provider_count=0, bazaar_listings=0, monitor_events=0, pack_count=0. The x402 marketplace and intake pipeline are unpopulated — no SKUs, no providers, no inventory.

signals.label: Market drawdown
signals.detail: ETH and AERO both down ~7% in 24h; correlated risk-off not isolated to one asset

signals.label: Worker idle
signals.detail: No cycles run, no channels active, zero actions completed — worker has never executed

signals.label: Commerce empty
signals.detail: Zero providers, zero bazaar listings, zero monitor events — x402 marketplace not yet onboarded

signals.label: Intake empty
signals.detail: Pack count is 0 with no latest_pack_ids — no data inventory exists for agent consumption

signals.label: GitHub scaffolding
signals.detail: Last push 2026-06-02; recent commits are chore (blog, SEO, sitemap) not operational features; 2 open issues

disclaimer: Automated operational pulse from swarm feeds — not financial advice. Data freshness depends on factory cycle interval.

marketing_campaign.hook: Farm Score Every Airdrop Before You Claim
marketing_campaign.body_short: Stop guessing which airdrops are worth your time. Constitution-first scam screening assigns a Farm Score from 0–100 — intelligence only, zero on-chain execution. Screen airdrop → https://api.agentic-swarm-marketplace.com/x402/v1/airdrop-intelligence
marketing_campaign.body_long: Every airdrop looks promising until it drains your wallet. **Airdrop Intelligence** runs constitution-first scam screening through dual rails — **LLM** for narrative analysis and **security** for contract-level red flags — delivering a Farm Score from 0–100. Intelligence only: no on-chain execution, no signature requests, just clarity. Plug in the optional **smart contract triage API** on Base for deeper contract review, or connect via **Base USDC x402** for autonomous buyer workflows. While markets pull back 7%, use the quiet to sort signal from noise. → Screen airdrop: https://api.agentic-swarm-marketplace.com/x402/v1/airdrop-intelligence
marketing_campaign.hashtags: airdrop screening, farm score, Base USDC x402, smart contract triage API
facts: Optional contract triage embed on Base.
